known_gaps: Current deterministic generation blocks before project write because the VCC_3v3 route tree cannot complete all required contacts after placement.
The rail3v3 VOUT anchor has no resolved physical endpoint, and VCC_3v3 contacts for the I2C header and regulator remain in separate same-net route graph components.
KiCad ERC/DRC and normalized round-trip pass claims are not current evidence until the VCC_3v3 routing blocker is resolved and the fixture is rerun.
notes: Medium-complexity protected USB-C I2C fixture retained as an expected-fail route-tree regression. It combines USB-C power, an AMS1117 3.3 V regulator rail, I2C sensor, pull-ups, decoupling, and a header. Fabrication-candidate work also requires manufacturer-specific AMS1117 ESR, effective-capacitance, and thermal review.
